column4: Proxy-mode session write protection relies on a client-side redirect for non-metered writes
Consent request can target arbitrary same-account profiles
Any @claude issue or comment can invoke a secret-backed agent

Deletion cancellation/restoration checks are not atomic with final deletes
Dormant web ChatShell still exposes voice controls bound to stale session handlers
Top-up credits permanently stranded after upgrading from a shared-pool tier to a per-profile tier
GET /account/deletion-status lacks the owner gate its three sibling routes enforce
Library-filing write endpoints missing proxy-mode guard (parent-in-proxy can mutate/delete child's session data)
issues: write granted at workflow scope leaks to every deploy job that does not need it

Homework summary LLM call can run without quota
PR title/author/base interpolated into the wired-in inline prompt without the untrusted-data framing used by the (unused) composite action
id-token: write declared on the review job with no OIDC exchange step
id-token: write granted to the agent job but no OIDC exchange is performed
Minimum-age enforcement uses birth year instead of full birth date

Raw learner subject input forwarded to Sentry in fallback catch block
Preformatted learner context blocks are appended to the system prompt without enforced escaping
Unbounded attempt accumulation and unbounded answerGiven on /quiz/rounds/:id/check (no rate limit, no size cap)

Duplicate accepted-aliases that should be diacritic variants (accented spellings not actually accepted)
Redundant if/else in fallbackAnalysis — both branches identical (harmless)

Dead `childProfileId` field in tellMentorInputSchema is a latent cross-profile (IDOR) footgun
Two different `useRestoreConsent` hooks with incompatible signatures

system-prompt / events / flag handlers return 500 (+ Sentry capture) instead of 404 for unknown sessionId
review route catch-all masks transient DB errors as 422 and echoes raw error message
JWKS response shape is unvalidated; a malformed upstream response is misclassified as a token error (wrongful 401/sign-out)

masteryScore query param not guarded against NaN (incomplete sweep of BUG-813 fix)

Non-transactional regenerate: ownership-check → delete-all → insert can race a concurrent same-user request
subjectId route param not normalized for array case (inconsistent with sibling screen)
